zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Hamilton - 4th Laird of Cadzow於1370年出生在蘇格蘭藍納可爾時，他的父親David Hamilton36歲，母親Jonetta Keith35歲。他和Janet Douglas of Dalkeith至少有1個兒子。他於1402年登記服兵役。他去世於1402年9月14日在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德享年32歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭韋斯特 洛迪安。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Hamilton - 4th Laird of Cadzow于1370年出生在苏格兰藍納可爾时，他的父亲David Hamilton36岁，母亲Jonetta Keith35岁。他和Janet Douglas of Dalkeith至少有1个儿子。他于1402年登记服兵役。他去世于1402年9月14日在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德享年32岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰韋斯特 洛迪安。

nameMeanings.name: Hamilton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: habitational name from what is now a deserted village in the parish of Barkby, Leicestershire. This is named from Old English hamel ‘crooked’ + dūn ‘hill’. Hamilton near Glasgow was founded by the English Hamiltons and named after them, and later bearers took their surname from the Scottish place. In the north of Ireland, where many Hamiltons settled in the 17th century, this surname may sometimes have been adopted for Hamill . It has also been adopted as an Anglicized form of southern Irish Ó hUrmholtaigh.

History: This name is borne by one of the most distinguished families of the Scottish nobility; they hold many titles, including marquessate and dukedom of Hamilton, the marquessate of Douglas, the dukedom of Abercorn, and the earldom of Haddington. They are descended from Walter FitzGilbert de Hameldone, a Norman baron who gave his support to Robert the Bruce in the 13th century. A member of this family was Sir William Hamilton (1730–1803), a British diplomat and archaeologist, whose wife, Lady Emma Hamilton (c. 1765–1815), became the mistress of Admiral Horatio Nelson. A branch of the family was established in Ireland by Sir Frederick Hamilton (died 1646), who served in the Swedish army of Gustavus Adolphus. He later became governor of Ulster, and his descendants were created viscounts Boyne. The family have given their name to Newtownhamilton and Hamiltonsbaron in County Armagh. Another branch of the family were to be found in Denmark, where Henrik Albertsen Hamilton (1588–1648) was a noted Latin poet. A 17th-century example of a Hamilton from Glasgow, Scotland, is recorded in the Netherlands, where the name is found in the form Hamelton. Another Scottish Hamilton, James, went to the West Indies in the 18th century and was the father of Alexander Hamilton (1755–1804), who arrived in NY in 1772 and became the first US secretary of the Treasury.

variants.name: Hamill
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire): of Norman origin, a habitational name from Haineville or Henneville in Manche, France, named from the ancient Germanic personal name Hagano + Old French ville ‘settlement’.
English (Lancashire): nickname for a maimed person or someone with a distinctive scar, from Middle English, Old English hamel ‘mutilated, scarred’.
Irish (Ulster): according to MacLysaght, a shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hÁdhmaill ‘descendant of Ádhmall’, which he derives from ádhmall ‘active’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Hamilton - 4th Laird of Cadzow was born in 1370, in Lanarkshire, Scotland, his father, David Hamilton, was 36 and his mother, Jonetta Keith, was 35. He had at least 1 son with Janet Douglas of Dalkeith. He registered for military service in 1402. He died on 14 September 1402, in Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 32, and was buried in West Lothian, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Hamilton - 4th Laird of Cadzow est né en 1370, à Lanarkshire, Écosse, son père, David Hamilton, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Jonetta Keith, avait 35 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Janet Douglas of Dalkeith. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1402. Il est décédé le 14 septembre 1402, à Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 32 ans, et a été enterré à West Lothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Hamilton - 4th Laird of Cadzow 1370 in Lanarkshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater David Hamilton 36 und seine Mutter Jonetta Keith 35. Er hatte mit Janet Douglas of Dalkeith mindestens 1 Sohn. Er hat sich 1402 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 14. September 1402 im Alter von 32 Jahren in Northumberland, England, United Kingdom und wurde in West Lothian, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Hamilton - 4th Laird of Cadzow è nato il nel 1370 nel Lanarkshire, Scotland, il suo padre, David Hamilton, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Jonetta Keith, aveva 35 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Janet Douglas of Dalkeith. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1402. Morì il 14 settembre 1402, nel Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 32 anni, e fu sepolto a West Lothian, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Hamilton - 4th Laird of Cadzowが1370年にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアで生まれた時，父David Hamiltonは36歳，母Jonetta Keithは35歳であった。彼はJanet Douglas of Dalkeithとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1402年に兵役登録をした。彼は1402年9月14日にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドで32歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドウエスト ロスアンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Hamilton - 4th Laird of Cadzow(이)가 1370년 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 David Hamilton(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Jonetta Keith(은)는 35세였다. 그는 Janet Douglas of Dalkeith(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1402년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1402년 9월 14일 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드에서 32세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 웨스트 로스이언에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Hamilton - 4th Laird of Cadzow nasceu em 1370, em Lanarkshire, Scotland, seu pai, David Hamilton, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Jonetta Keith, tinha 35 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Janet Douglas of Dalkeith. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1402. Ele faleceu em 14 de setembro de 1402, em Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 32 anos, e foi sepultado em West Lothian, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Hamilton - 4th Laird of Cadzow родился в 1370 г. в местности ланаркшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени David Hamilton было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Jonetta Keith, 35. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Janet Douglas of Dalkeith. В 1402 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 14 сентября 1402 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 32 лет и был похоронен в местности вест лотян, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Hamilton - 4th Laird of Cadzow nació en 1370, en Lanarkshire, Scotland, su papá, David Hamilton, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Jonetta Keith, tenía 35 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Janet Douglas of Dalkeith. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1402. Murió el 14 de septiembre de 1402, en Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 32 años, y fue sepultado en West Lothian, Escocia, Reino Unido.
